title: erodium cicutarium f. pilosum
intro: Erodium cicutarium f. pilosum, also known as redstem storksbill, is a plant species within the geranium family (Geraniaceae) that is characterized by its hairy leaves and red stems. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant is also said to possess health benefits such as reducing stress and promoting relaxation due to its sedative effects. Erodium cicutarium f. pilosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, although its preparation and usage should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
